svg.text: solid = implemented · dashed = in progress · green arrow = the compounding self-improvement loop
→ resolves: timeout · task_budget · effort · soft_limit · cost_cap
two-axis lookup: investigation→severity map; else→request_type map
Tardis investigation loop · Opus 4.7 · adaptive thinking
build context → call API → tool_use? → execute → checkpoint → repeat
stop on: end_turn (trusted) · timeout · cost · turn cap
④ emergency turn cap (pure runaway protection)
single point for all 10 messages.create() sites
routes by purpose · attaches cache_control · selects effort · enforces max_tokens
no soft-limit nudges for critical/high — model decides when investigation is complete
90% cost reduction on stable prefix · accuracy unchanged
recall: vector + FTS5 + service match + verified boost + temporal decay
effective queries · anti-patterns · failure signatures (per service)
extracted post-investigation by Opus 4.7 (was Haiku — accuracy upgrade)
IN PROGRESS — only added if 4.7 + thinking doesn't fix it organically
per-thread list of claims user pushed back on; never re-stated as findings
runs BEFORE compaction or context entry
12 regex: MRN · DOB · SSN · phone · keys · JWT
Haiku 4.5 · only fires on Slack RCA formatting
raw tool output → Opus (preserves error codes, traces)
SQLite · saves full conversation state every turn
crash recovery: pod restart resumes mid-investigation
per-investigation cost · turns · tools · cache hit rate
tracks: input · output · cache_creation · cache_read tokens
if confidence is low → loop back to main agent to gather missing info → re-synthesize → re-judge (max 2 retries) → post
retry cap: 2 cycles, then post w/ low-conf label
Slack post · fires after gate passes
verified RCA goes to Slack thread
▸ confidence label baked in (✓ verified / ⚠️ retried-out)
Slack thread is then read-only input
human corrections + reactions accumulate naturally during the incident
post-investigation NEVER updates the post afterwards
low confidence → "gather missing info: ..." → re-run main agent
if posted with low-conf label → skip Tier 2 store
reads the completed thread (RCA + corrections + reactions) → writes to Tardis's own knowledge → NEVER updates the Slack post
runs after thread quiescence (5 min idle)
e.g. NLB IPs ≠ pod IPs (sm4, Apr 28)
no auto-apply — owners review every change
▶ The compounding loop. Each investigation makes Tardis smarter.
Slack thread is read-only input · Tardis's own knowledge files are the output
ROADMAP: started with manual @tardis remember + 👍/👎; automating the analyzer + generator is the next compound
Prometheus metrics · JSONL event log · cache hit rate · turn distribution · cross-judge agreement rate · cost per investigation
